code:
%% Feature Mindmap Template
%% Replace with your actual feature breakdown

mindmap
  root(CloudNative_DockerImage))
    Authentication
      Login
        Email/Password
        Social OAuth
        SSO/SAML
      Registration
        Email verification
        Onboarding flow
      Security
        2FA/MFA
        Session management
        Password policies
    User Management
      Profiles
        Avatar upload
        Preferences
        Notifications
      Organisations
        Team creation
        Role assignment
        Invitations
      Permissions
        Role-based access
        Resource sharing
        Audit logging
    Core Features
      Dashboard
        Analytics widgets
        Quick actions
        Recent activity
      Projects
        CRUD operations
        Collaboration
        Version history
      Tasks
        Assignment
        Due dates
        Comments
        Attachments
    Integrations
      APIs
        REST endpoints
        GraphQL
        Webhooks
      Third-party
        Slack
        GitHub
        Jira
      Import/Export
        CSV
        JSON
        PDF reports
    Infrastructure
      Performance
        Caching
        CDN
        Database optimisation
      Reliability
        Backups
        Monitoring
        Alerting
      Scalability
        Load balancing
        Auto-scaling
        Multi-region

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为CloudNative_DockerImage这个产品设计一个完整的功能脑图，先从根节点开始，然后分五大模块：Authentication、User Management、Core Features、Integrations和Infrastructure。
明白，五大模块作为一级分支。Authentication这块您打算放哪些具体功能？我看到有Login、Registration和Security三个子项。
对，Login下面要有Email/Password、Social OAuth和SSO/SAML三种方式；Registration需要Email verification和Onboarding flow；Security这块重点做2FA/MFA、Session management和Password policies。
好的，Authentication分支已完成。接下来User Management我拆成了Profiles、Organisations和Permissions，其中Profiles包含Avatar upload、Preferences和Notifications。
Profiles没问题。Organisations下面加上Team creation、Role assignment和Invitations；Permissions要体现Role-based access、Resource sharing和Audit logging。
Core Features这块我规划了Dashboard、Projects和Tasks三个核心模块。Dashboard放Analytics widgets、Quick actions和Recent activity；Projects做CRUD operations、Collaboration和Version history。您看Tasks需要细化吗？
Tasks需要Assignment、Due dates、Comments和Attachments四个功能点。另外Integrations模块我们得支持APIs、Third-party和Import/Export，其中APIs要列出REST endpoints、GraphQL和Webhooks。
Integrations的Third-party我放了Slack、GitHub和Jira；Import/Export支持CSV、JSON和PDF reports。最后Infrastructure分Performance、Reliability和Scalability，其中Performance包含Caching、CDN和Database optimisation。
Reliability加上Backups、Monitoring和Alerting；Scalability这块要有Load balancing、Auto-scaling和Multi-region部署能力。这样整个产品架构就完整了。

全部完成。我检查一下：根节点CloudNative_DockerImage，五个一级分支，每个分支下两到三层结构，所有功能点包括Authentication的SSO/SAML、User Management的Audit logging、Core Features的Quick actions、Integrations的REST endpoints和PDF reports、Infrastructure的Auto-scaling和Multi-region都已到位。
